tasks.title: Design users table schema
tasks.description: Add a users table with id, email (unique), password_hash, created_at fields and migrations for the Go backend.
tasks.design_notes: Use a PostgreSQL UUID primary key and index the email column for fast lookup.

tasks.title: Implement password hashing utility
tasks.description: Create a Go package that hashes passwords with bcrypt and validates them during login.
tasks.design_notes: Wrap golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt in a thin service to allow future algorithm swaps.

tasks.title: Create registration and login endpoints
tasks.description: Add POST /api/register and POST /api/login handlers that store hashed passwords and issue JWTs on success.
tasks.design_notes: Separate handler logic from request parsing; return signed JWTs with a 15‑minute expiry and a refresh token.

tasks.title: Add JWT authentication middleware
tasks.description: Develop middleware that validates JWTs from Authorization headers and populates request context with user info.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage a reusable ContextKey and abort the request with 401 on token failure.

tasks.title: Build frontend login and registration pages
tasks.description: Create Preact components for sign‑up and sign‑in, perform client‑side validation, and call the new API endpoints.
tasks.design_notes: Use functional components with useState/useEffect and a shared AuthService for API calls.

tasks.title: Store JWT in HttpOnly secure cookie and add logout
tasks.description: Modify login to set an HttpOnly SameSite=Strict cookie and implement a POST /api/logout that clears it.
tasks.design_notes: Configure cookie attributes based on the environment (development vs production).

tasks.title: Write unit and integration tests for auth flow
tasks.description: Add Go tests for password hashing, endpoint responses, JWT middleware, and Preact component interaction using Vitest.
tasks.design_notes: Mock the database layer and use a table‑driven test for edge cases like duplicate email registration.
